name: The City Golf - West LA
address: 11500 W Olympic Blvd Suite 100, Los Angeles, CA 90064
about: The City Golf is a premium indoor golf range facility with locations in Los Angeles, Sherman Oaks, and West LA. It utilizes Foresight's GCQuad and Falcon launch monitors to provide precise ball-flight and club-head data analysis. The venue caters to golfers seeking to refine their game with pro-grade feedback, offering simulator bays, a dedicated Performance Center for club fitting with a PGA professional, and a state-of-the-art putting training system called TourPutt. In-house instructors are available for free quick pointers or private lessons. The facility requires patrons to bring their own clubs as no rentals are provided.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced GCQuad and Falcon launch monitors provide precise club and ball data analysis
In-house PGA professionals offer coaching and club fitting services
TourPutt system allows for detailed putting pattern analysis and training
High-tech simulation environment available day or night regardless of weather
Performance Center fittings with equipment used by PGA/LPGA Tour Players

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site kitchen or food service.
No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor using a combination of infrared object tracking and high-speed camera technology
Used in some bays alongside GCQuad for quadrascopic data
Used in a number of bays
Used in a number of bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs. The City Golf does not provide any rental clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention a policy regarding bringing outside food or drink, but also does not indicate an on-site kitchen or bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website mentions that simulated 18-hole play is available but does not specify an estimated time for a round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding child-friendly features, policies, or junior programs mentioned on the website.
